comments.text: It has been proved that there is an absolute constant $c$ such that for infinitely many $n$ satisfying $\tau(n+k )\ll k^c$ for all integers $k\geq1$, by C. F. Lau in [La26]. (The site has been updated to address this comment.)
The solution to this problem, just like [469], would allow one to bypass some technical details in certain proofs. But this prospect seems unlikely.
